title: cissampelos pareira var. hirta
intro: Cissampelos pareira var. hirta, a variant of the Cissampelos pareira plant, is a woody climber native to tropical regions of Asia and is used in traditional medicine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cissampelos pareira var. hirta is traditionally prepared in herbal medicines, including decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine practices.
